findings.message: PoC skin.css missing — run `forge --sync-loom` to bootstrap.

advocacy.why: static/loom-skin.css is the design-system bytes every rendered page links to; a missing file means every <link rel=stylesheet> 404s in the browser
advocacy.substrate_fix: run `forge --sync-loom` to copy current Loom skin.css bytes into static/
advocacy.anti_pattern: don't `touch static/loom-skin.css` — an empty file passes existence check but strips every rendered page of its design system

findings.message: skin.css not present — nothing to self-check
no loom.css or loom-skin.css found — theme drift not verified

advocacy.why: without the loom-emitted skin.css, the theme-consistency gate can't verify cascade integrity; the build is shipping unchecked theme behavior
advocacy.substrate_fix: ensure `forge build` runs the render phase first (it emits skin.css to static/); if `loom sync --regenerate` was skipped, run it before the next forge build

findings.message: loom binary not found (/home/paul/projects/PlausiDen-Forge/crates/forge-phases/PlausiDen-Loom/target/release/loom, /home/paul/projects/PlausiDen-Forge/crates/forge-phases/PlausiDen-Loom/target/debug/loom, ./target/release/loom, ./target/debug/loom, /usr/local/sbin/loom, /usr/local/bin/loom, /usr/sbin/loom, /usr/bin/loom, /sbin/loom, /bin/loom) — contrast not verified (build cargo run --release -p loom-cli in PlausiDen-Loom or set LOOM_BIN env)
missing sitemap.xml — search-engine crawl coverage suffers
no backends.toml — UI ↔ backend mapping unverified

advocacy.why: without backends.toml the phantom_button + backend_coverage gates can't enforce capability declarations; UI buttons without backing data-backend slugs ship silently broken
advocacy.substrate_fix: create `backends.toml` at the project root with one `[[backend]] id = "..." kind = "..." endpoint = "..."` entry per UI affordance that needs server wiring

findings.message: dev server not responding — start it (e.g. `python3 -m http.server 8123 --directory static`) and re-run; runtime audit skipped
